name: backend-patterns
tagline: Reference catalog of Node/Express/Next.js backend patterns: API design, DB, caching, auth, rate limiting, logging.
verdict: Solid, internally consistent code-pattern reference with no security or scope issues. Main weaknesses: 598-line SKILL.md inlines 7+ full topic catalogs with no references/ split, no negative-trigger scoping despite covering the whole backend stack, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description: 'Backend architecture patterns, API design, database optimization, and server-side best practices...' names the domain but never phrases concrete 'use when' trigger situations.
No 'NOT for'/out-of-scope exclusions anywhere despite the skill spanning the entire backend stack (API, DB, cache, auth, jobs, logging).
Content: '## Caching Strategies' — one of 7+ full pattern catalogs (API, DB, caching, auth, rate limiting, jobs, logging) inlined in one 598-line file with zero references/ split.
